content_of_post_to_comment:
I can't see it as a win, haven't been on Reddit for 3 months and just logged in to put up a post that ended up pissing me off, I really regret it.

I don't know why these relapses happen, even though I know I'm doing well and won't be doomscrolling all day ever again. Does anyone else feel the same way?
comment: Logging back in after 3 months and getting pulled into that same irritation loop makes sense. The platform doesn’t really stay 'neutral' just because you were away. I’ve noticed even short re-entries can kick old scrolling patterns back in fast. It’s not as clean a break as it feels. What part set you off?
